Method for Conducting an Analysis of Power Quality:
paragraphs: In the present world, power is an essential component of daily life. Most daily-use things are powered in some form. To provide people with electricity in a safe and reasonable manner, we must utilize the most advanced power technologies available. Harmonics increase the RMS of the circuit’s current flow, hence increasing the loss. This has caused several problems with the electrical systems. Harmonics can influence the whole distribution system, including the loads. Harmonics can also damage delicate offices and manufacturing gadgets and equipment. Harmonic flaws may not always be immediately apparent , and it can be difficult to differentiate from normal wear and tear.

Due to their small size, harmonic issues may make the power supply less reliable. In power systems, electric current and voltage harmonics generate issues. When there are several harmonics in the power supply, equipment may malfunction or fail. A nonlinear load frequently induces harmonics, or fluctuations in the shape of the current waveform, in an electrical system. Personal computers, variable speed motors, driven motors, fax machines, laser printers, Switch-mode power supplies (SMPS), batteries, and uninterruptible power supplies generate nonlinear loads and harmonics in power systems ( UPS ).

Harmonic reduces the reliability and efficiency of electrical systems. If you use harmonic analysis to identify harmonics in your power system, your power system’s reliability will increase. As the use of power electronics equipment increases, non-linear currents are produced. Harmonics were generated because of the system demands. Equipment must utilize less electricity and meet energy efficiency requirements.

When a sinusoidal waveform hits a nonlinear load, the system experiences distortion and harmonic production. Harmonic analysis is commonly required for determining the presence or absence of harmonics in a system.

Carelabs provides technicians with the most up-to-date tools, who guarantee the security of your electrical equipment and give you a reliable operating environment. Get a quote right away and learn more about Carelabs’ harmonic study and analysis services.
bulletLists: If the total load or bus system measurements surpass 25% of the total load, the harmonic restrictions must be checked.

Harmonic analysis must be performed when an extra capacitor bank is added to the electrical systems.
Harmonic analysis reduces operating costs by decreasing the amount of energy lost through cables, switch gears, and safety systems. Additionally, it helps reduce power system losses.
It decreases the RMS current in the power system and facilitates the elimination of oversized transformers, hence reducing the amount of cable, switchgear, and busbars required.

Analyze the voltage and current distortion levels, as well as the harmonics.
If the degree of harmonic distortion is excessive, select a remedy.
